prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with an abstract, dark blue gradient screen. Near the center-right there is a small, bright yellow mark or dash, with no identifiable object or setting yet visible.

It then cuts to an indoor scene. A young adult woman with her hair tied back stands facing someone in the foreground, who is mostly out of frame and seen only as a dark shoulder/back shape. The woman wears a black short-sleeved top and has a serious, focused expression. The setting appears to be an interior room with a doorway and exposed wall conduit visible behind her.

The next scene shows two women training in a gym or martial-arts studio. The room has padded-looking wall panels, a high ceiling, and training equipment in the background. The women are bent forward and grappling with each other, barefoot, in athletic clothing. One wears a dark top and light shorts; the other wears a sleeveless top and dark leggings. Small white on-screen text at the bottom reads: “Real strength isn’t pushing through pain.”

The action continues on the floor, where the women are engaged in ground grappling. A large bold slogan fills the center of the frame: “NO PAIN” in white and “MORE GAIN” in yellow. Additional small text appears near the bottom, including “there’s more gain,” and very small disclaimer-style text that is difficult to read fully in the sampled frame.

The commercial then shows the two women standing again in the training space. One woman, wearing a black athletic shirt, appears to be guiding or supporting the other woman, who is wearing gloves and Muay Thai-style shorts. The mood remains focused and instructional. Bottom text reads: “Advil targets pain caused by inflammation for fast, strong relief.”

The final product display appears on a tabletop or low platform in the foreground. Three Advil products are shown clearly: Advil Liqui-Gels, Advil tablets, and Advil Dual Action Acetaminophen. The background remains the same gym/training space but is blurred, with people and a folding chair visible behind the products. A “HALEON” logo appears in the upper-right corner. Bottom text reads: “Advil. That’s real strength.” with “Use as directed.” beneath it.

In the last frame, the product lineup remains in the foreground. Large white text appears above the products reading: “THAT’S REAL.” The Haleon logo stays in the upper-right corner, and the lower text still reads: “Advil. That’s real strength.” with “Use as directed.” The background continues to show the blurred training-room setting.
